channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ripun Bora’s Political Journey in Assam: Career, Roles, and Party Switches
item.description: Ripun Bora is a senior Congress leader from Assam who has played a significant role in the state’s political landscape over the past two decades. Beginning his electoral journey with a victory from th...

item.title: Morocco unveils $700m skyscraper to strengthen its global presence
item.description: A new $700 million skyscraper, the 820-foot Mohammed VI Tower, has been inaugurated in Morocco. Located in Salé, the twin city of Rabat, this 55-storey building is inspired by a rocket on its launchpa...

item.title: King Charles III prepares for challenging US state visit amid complex political climate
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla are set to embark on a significant state visit to the United States, described by royal sources as both high risk and high opportunity. The visit comes at a delicate...

item.title: Security Incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner Leads to Trump's Evacuation
item.description: A tense security situation unfolded at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner on April 25, 2026, when gunshots were fired outside the ballroom, prompting the evacuation of President Donald Trump. The ...

item.title: Rise in online child luring cases in Canada sparks concern and calls for stronger laws

item.title: Why voice notes are popular globally but less embraced in the UK
item.description: Voice notes, introduced by WhatsApp in 2013, have become a widely used form of communication in many parts of the world, including India, Mexico and the UAE. However, their popularity in the United Ki...

item.title: Harry Styles supports grassroots bands with tour levy fund to ease touring costs
item.description: Emerging UK bands such as Norwich's Brown Horse face considerable financial pressures while touring, often relying on merchandise sales more than ticket revenue to stay afloat. Members sleep on friend...

item.title: India, New Zealand to sign Free Trade Agreement, boosting exports with 100% duty-free access
item.description: India and New Zealand are set to sign a historic Free Trade Agreement (FTA) on April 27, 2026, marking a significant milestone in their trade relations. The deal will offer Indian exporters 100% duty-...

item.title: Astrobotic successfully tests rotating detonation rocket engine with 4,000 pounds of thrust
item.description: Astrobotic, a U.S.-based space company, has successfully tested a new type of rocket propulsion system known as a rotating detonation rocket engine (RDRE), marking a significant step forward in space ...

item.title: Why Defensive Realism is Shaping Modern State Behaviour
item.description: The article explains how political realism continues to shape how countries behave in an uncertain and competitive global system. Realism assumes that there is no central global authority, so states m...

item.title: Torrance Man Arrested After Shooting Incident at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old teacher from Torrance, California, has been identified as the suspect in a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner. The chaotic scene un...

item.title: Atlanta United defeats Toronto FC, ending their home and overall unbeaten run
item.description: Atlanta United defeated Toronto FC 2-1 on a cold, rainy afternoon at BMO Field, ending Toronto’s seven-game unbeaten streak and 13-game home unbeaten run. Despite dominating possession with 68% of the...

item.description: The Philippine women's relay team brought home a silver medal from the Asian Beach Games! The announcement, made on April 26, 2026, signifies a significant achievement for Filipino athletes on the int...

item.title: Zwane praises Maqokola after AmaZulu’s dominant 5-1 win over Chippa United

item.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner Evacuated After Gunfire, High-Profile Attendees Safe

item.title: Moses placed on report for high tackle on Trbojevic

item.title: Trump Safe After Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner; Suspect Arrested
